use_cases: Landing page hero backgrounds with ambient animated particles
Decorative page backgrounds for SaaS and portfolio websites
Dynamic visual effects for brand storytelling and product showcases
Animated ambient backgrounds for media and content platforms
Interactive web backgrounds for e-commerce product pages
ai_summary: Morphic Background is an animated particle system that renders colorful SVG circles floating upward with sine wave motion. Particles have configurable colors, scales, and rotation, creating a dynamic yet subtle ambient effect. The animation runs continuously with physics-based movement, making it suitable for decorative hero sections, landing pages, or brand presentations across various industries.
